purpose: Single subject full studio portrait, neutral background, classical lighting.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Classical studio portrait of Saudi {subject_gender} in their thirties, {dress_specification}, three-quarter body pose facing camera, neutral cream studio backdrop with subtle gradient, soft directional key light from upper left at 45 degrees with subtle fill from right, real skin texture, confident composed expression, shot on 85mm at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: T37. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default dress: men thobe and ghutra, women modest hijab and conservative colored abaya. For brand ambassador moments where face must be visible. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 1 per quarter. Compliance level: elevated.
